title: Fuzzy AI: We warm your prospects before reaching out | Product Hunt
excerpt: Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet. Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice. Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.
content_html: Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet. Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice. Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.

Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.

Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice. Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place. Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.

sentences.en: Cold outreach gets ignored because prospects do not know you yet.
sentences.zh: 冷漠的外展会被忽视，因为潜在客户还不认识你。

sentences.en: Fuzzy warms them before you ever reach out by finding people already engaging in your market, helping you stay visible through content and thoughtful comments, then launching personalised LinkedIn and email campaigns in your voice.
sentences.zh: Fuzzy 在您接触之前就先找到已经参与您的市场的人，通过内容和深思熟虑的评论帮助您保持知名度，然后用您的声音发起个性化的 LinkedIn 和电子邮件活动，从而让他们感到温暖。

sentences.en: Research, enrichment, sequences, replies and team workflows live in one place.
sentences.zh: 研究、丰富、排序、回复和团队工作流程集中在一处。

sentences.en: Customers call it intuitive, seamless and more comprehensive than the tools they used before.
sentences.zh: 客户称其比他们以前使用的工具直观、无缝且更全面。

content_html_zh: 冷漠的外展会被忽视，因为潜在客户还不认识你。 Fuzzy 在您接触之前就先找到已经参与您的市场的人，通过内容和深思熟虑的评论帮助您保持知名度，然后用您的声音发起个性化的 LinkedIn 和电子邮件活动，从而让他们感到温暖。 研究、丰富、排序、回复和团队工作流程集中在一处。 客户称其比他们以前使用的工具直观、无缝且更全面。
